things.name: Vieux Lyon
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Renaissance old town with traboules and Florentine architecture

things.name: Basilique de Fourviere
things.description: Stunning white basilica dominating the city from the hill, with panoramic views

things.name: Musee des Confluences
things.description: Spectacular deconstructivist science and society museum at the confluence of two rivers

things.name: Traboules
things.description: Secret network of Renaissance passageways connecting streets through private courtyards

things.name: Parc de la Tete d'Or
things.description: 117-hectare urban park with a lake, botanical garden, zoo and rose garden

things.name: Institut Lumiere
things.description: Museum in the villa of the Lumiere brothers, inventors of cinema

things.name: Musee des Beaux-Arts
things.description: One of France's largest fine arts museums housed in a 17th-century Benedictine abbey

things.name: Croix-Rousse
things.description: Historic silk-weaving district with bohemian cafes, markets and traboules

things.name: Roman Amphitheatres
things.description: Ancient Gallo-Roman theatres on Fourviere Hill hosting summer performances

things.name: Presqu'ile
things.description: Peninsula between the Rhone and Saone rivers with elegant squares and Haussmann architecture
